programme.title: Big House Little House
programme.desc: Using his years of experience, Aidan helps two couples spend wisely.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Gardens
programme.desc: Monty sets off on a tour of India, taking in some of the most opulent gardens in the world

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Gardens
programme.desc: Monty visits China and Japan, where he views the awesome yellow mountains of Huangshang.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: BBC Home & Garden provides home renovation shows, interior design makeovers, and garden transformation programming. It features British lifestyle content focused on property upgrades, DIY projects, and creative home improvement ideas.
